name: Security Gate — Runtime Policy Enforcement
description: Intercepta acciones en archivos restringidos y consulta al Security Agent de NARA para evaluar si es seguro proceder.

then.prompt: Before proceeding with this write operation, verify it follows the security policies defined in .kiro/steering/security.md. If the file being modified is related to authentication, infrastructure, credentials, or CI/CD pipelines, flag it as requiring careful review. Check AGENTS.md restricted operations section.
